item.title: calendar [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: calendar [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: chellom
item.itunes:summary:
calendar
(Office Apps)
It comprehensively features rich, some of its notable features include:
Supports multiple calendars and to-do lists.
Supports attachment of events and todos.
Quick event and to-do entry.
Undo and redo functions..
Alarm notifications.
Todo integration with agenda view...
Plugin for Jewish calendar dates.
Kontact integration.
Highly customizable.


Title: "Organize Your Life with Our Feature-Rich Calendar App"

Description:

Welcome to the next generation of calendar apps – the one-stop solution to streamline your life, enhance productivity, and stay on top of your commitments. Say goodbye to scattered schedules and hello to organized simplicity with our Calendar App.

Key Features:

1. **Seamless Scheduling**: Effortlessly plan your days, weeks, and months with a clean and intuitive interface that's easy to navigate. Our calendar app ensures you never miss an appointment or deadline.

2. **Custom Views**: Choose from a variety of views, including daily, weekly, monthly, and agenda, to adapt your calendar to your preferred perspective.

3. **Events and Reminders**: Set up and manage events, appointments, and reminders with just a few taps. Our app will keep you in the know about upcoming commitments.

4. **Sync Across Devices**: Stay in sync with your calendar across multiple devices, whether you're on your smartphone, tablet, or computer. Your schedule is always at your fingertips.

5. **Color Coding**: Keep your life organized and visually appealing by assigning colors to different events and categories. It's easy to distinguish between work, personal, and social commitments.

6. **Share and Collaborate**: Collaborate with family, friends, or colleagues by sharing specific calendars. Keep everyone in the loop, whether it's for family events, team projects, or social gatherings.

7. **Location and Maps Integration**: Easily add event locations and access maps for directions, making sure you never get lost on your way to an important meeting or event.

8. **Task Lists**: Seamlessly integrate task lists into your calendar, enabling you to manage your to-dos alongside your appointments and events. Stay on top of your tasks and priorities.

9. **Weather Updates**: Get real-time weather updates for your location right within the app, so you're always prepared for whatever Mother Nature has in store.

10. **Privacy and Security**: Rest easy knowing your data is secure with robust privacy settings. Your personal information is protected, and you have full control over who can access your calendar.

Our Calendar App is designed to be your indispensable scheduling and organization companion, whether you're a professional balancing work commitments, a parent managing family events, or simply someone who wants to make the most of their time.

Stay in control of your life and start organizing with ease. Buy our Calendar App today and experience a new level of efficiency, no matter how busy your schedule gets.
[read more]

Highly customizable.


Title: "Organize Your Life with Our Feature-Rich Calendar App"

Description:

Welcome to the next generation of calendar apps – the one-stop solution to streamline your life, enhance productivity, and stay on top of your commitments. Say goodbye to scattered schedules and hello to organized simplicity with our Calendar App.

3. **Events and Reminders**: Set up and manage events, appointments, and reminders with just a few taps. Our app will keep you in the know about upcoming commitments.

6. **Share and Collaborate**: Collaborate with family, friends, or colleagues by sharing specific calendars. Keep everyone in the loop, whether it's for family events, team projects, or social gatherings.

7. **Location and Maps Integration**: Easily add event locations and access maps for directions, making sure you never get lost on your way to an important meeting or event.

8. **Task Lists**: Seamlessly integrate task lists into your calendar, enabling you to manage your to-dos alongside your appointments and events. Stay on top of your tasks and priorities.

9. **Weather Updates**: Get real-time weather updates for your location right within the app, so you're always prepared for whatever Mother Nature has in store.

10. **Privacy and Security**: Rest easy knowing your data is secure with robust privacy settings. Your personal information is protected, and you have full control over who can access your calendar.

Our Calendar App is designed to be your indispensable scheduling and organization companion, whether you're a professional balancing work commitments, a parent managing family events, or simply someone who wants to make the most of their time.

Stay in control of your life and start organizing with ease. Buy our Calendar App today and experience a new level of efficiency, no matter how busy your schedule gets.

calendar
(Office Apps)
It comprehensively features rich, some of its notable features include:
Supports multiple calendars and to-do lists.
Supports attachment of events and todos.
Quick event and to-do entry.
Undo and redo functions..
Alarm notifications.
Todo integration with agenda view...
Plugin for Jewish calendar dates.
Kontact integration.
Highly customizable.


Title: "Organize Your Life with Our Feature-Rich Calendar App"

Description:

Welcome to the next generation of calendar apps – the one-stop solution to streamline your life, enhance productivity, and stay on top of your commitments. Say goodbye to scattered schedules and hello to organized simplicity with our Calendar App.

Key Features:

1. **Seamless Scheduling**: Effortlessly plan your days, weeks, and months with a clean and intuitive interface that's easy to navigate. Our calendar app ensures you never miss an appointment or deadline.

2. **Custom Views**: Choose from a variety of views, including daily, weekly, monthly, and agenda, to adapt your calendar to your preferred perspective.

3. **Events and Reminders**: Set up and manage events, appointments, and reminders with just a few taps. Our app will keep you in the know about upcoming commitments.

4. **Sync Across Devices**: Stay in sync with your calendar across multiple devices, whether you're on your smartphone, tablet, or computer. Your schedule is always at your fingertips.

5. **Color Coding**: Keep your life organized and visually appealing by assigning colors to different events and categories. It's easy to distinguish between work, personal, and social commitments.

7. **Location and Maps Integration**: Easily add event locations and access maps for directions, making sure you never get lost on your way to an important meeting or event.

8. **Task Lists**: Seamlessly integrate task lists into your calendar, enabling you to manage your to-dos alongside your appointments and events. Stay on top of your tasks and priorities.

9. **Weather Updates**: Get real-time weather updates for your location right within the app, so you're always prepared for whatever Mother Nature has in store.

10. **Privacy and Security**: Rest easy knowing your data is secure with robust privacy settings. Your personal information is protected, and you have full control over who can access your calendar.

Our Calendar App is designed to be your indispensable scheduling and organization companion, whether you're a professional balancing work commitments, a parent managing family events, or simply someone who wants to make the most of their time.

Stay in control of your life and start organizing with ease. Buy our Calendar App today and experience a new level of efficiency, no matter how busy your schedule gets.
[read more]

item.title: calculator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: calculator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: chellom
item.itunes:summary:
calculator
(Office Apps)
Title: "Calculate with Ease: Your Go-To Calculator App"
Description:.


Introducing the ultimate calculator app that redefines the way you crunch numbers and solve equations. Say goodbye to manual calculations and embrace the future of effortless mathematics. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App has you covered.
...
Key Features:
.
1. **Effortless Precision**: Our calculator app delivers unparalleled accuracy, ensuring that your calculations are always spot-on, whether you're working on complex equations or simple arithmetic.

2. **User-Friendly Interface**: Our intuitive, user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to perform calculations. With a familiar layout, you'll feel right at home.

3. **Scientific Functions**: Need to tackle advanced math or scientific problems? No worries. Our calculator app includes a wide range of scientific functions, making it the perfect tool for students, engineers, and scientists.

4. **Graphing Capabilities**: Visualize your mathematical equations with our built-in graphing feature. Gain a deeper understanding of your data and functions with dynamic graphs.

5. **Unit Conversion**: Effortlessly convert between units such as length, weight, temperature, and more. Our calculator app provides a handy unit conversion tool, saving you time and effort.

6. **History & Memory**: Review your calculation history and access stored values for easy reference. Never lose track of your work or results again.

7. **Customizable Themes**: Personalize your calculator app with a variety of themes and color schemes to suit your style and preferences.

8. **Multi-Platform Compatibility**: Our calculator app is available for iOS and Android devices, ensuring you can carry a powerful calculator in your pocket wherever you go.

9. **No Ads, No Distractions**: Enjoy a clean, ad-free interface that lets you focus entirely on your calculations without any interruptions.

10. **Continuous Updates**: We're committed to providing regular updates to enhance and expand the functionality of our calculator app, ensuring you always have access to the latest features.

Whether you're a student solving complex math problems, an engineer working on critical projects, or a professional in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App is the all-in-one solution you've been looking for. Experience the future of mathematics at your fingertips.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your mathematical toolkit. Buy our Calculator App today and simplify your calculations with precision and style!
[read more]

calculator
(Office Apps)
Title: "Calculate with Ease: Your Go-To Calculator App"
Description:.


Introducing the ultimate calculator app that redefines the way you crunch numbers and solve equations. Say goodbye to manual calculations and embrace the future of effortless mathematics. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App has you covered.
...
Key Features:
.
1. **Effortless Precision**: Our calculator app delivers unparalleled accuracy, ensuring that your calculations are always spot-on, whether you're working on complex equations or simple arithmetic.

2. **User-Friendly Interface**: Our intuitive, user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to perform calculations. With a familiar layout, you'll feel right at home.

3. **Scientific Functions**: Need to tackle advanced math or scientific problems? No worries. Our calculator app includes a wide range of scientific functions, making it the perfect tool for students, engineers, and scientists.

4. **Graphing Capabilities**: Visualize your mathematical equations with our built-in graphing feature. Gain a deeper understanding of your data and functions with dynamic graphs.

Whether you're a student solving complex math problems, an engineer working on critical projects, or a professional in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App is the all-in-one solution you've been looking for. Experience the future of mathematics at your fingertips.

Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

item.content:encoded:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

item.title: WholeClear EML to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear EML to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]
item.description:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]

item.title: Planes [Board]
item.itunes:title: Planes [Board]
item.itunes:author: xxxcucus
item.itunes:summary:
Planes
(Board)
Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.
Starting with version 0.4.0 the Android app allows multiplayer games as well.
It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

[read more]
item.description:

Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.

It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

(Board)
Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.
Starting with version 0.4.0 the Android app allows multiplayer games as well.
It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]

item.title: KDE CDEmu Manager [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: KDE CDEmu Manager [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: marcel83
item.itunes:summary:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]
item.description:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]

item.title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]
item.description:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]

item.title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:author: ssh-mitm
item.itunes:summary:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
